verses.text: Tua khit ciangin Faro' kiangah Moses leh Aaron pai-in, “Israel Pasian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute in sehnel gamah kei-a' dingin pawi khat a kham theihna dingun ka mite paisak in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Faro in, “Ama thu mangin Israel mite ka paisakna dingin Topa na cih uh kua ahi hiam? Topa na cih uh ka thei kei hi. Tua thamloin Israel-te ka paisak kei ding hi,” na ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hebru-te' Pasian ko kiangah hong kilangzo hi. Hong thum ung; amah in natna ahih kei leh namsau tawh kote hong hihkha ding ahih manin, ni thum paina sehnel gamah kote hong paisakin, Topa ka Pasian uh' tungah biakna hong piasak in,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Egypt kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Moses leh Aaron aw, bang hangin amau' nasepna panin mite paikhiasak ding na hi uh hiam? Na nasepnate uhah pai un,” na ci hi
Tua ciangin Faro in, “En un, tu-in hih mite tam mahmah a, amau' nasepnate panin amaute na tawlngasak uh hi,” ci lai hi
Tua ni mahin Faro in nasem ukte leh a nasem mapite thu pia a
“Tumasiah-a bangin, leiseek bawlna dingin mite tungah buhtu na pia nawn kei ding uh hi. Amaute paisak un la, amau mah buhtu khawmsak tawm un

Ahih hangin tumasiah-a a leiseek bawlzah mah uh amaute na bawlsak ding uh hi. Bangbang hita leh na khiam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadah uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute kiko-in, ‘Kote hong paisakin ka Pasian uh tungah biakna hong piasak un’ ci uh hi
Amaute in na semin zuau thute a donlohna dingin mihingte tungah nasep haksa zaw suan un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin nasem ukte leh nasem mapite paikhia-in mite tungah, “Faro in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note buhtu kong pia kei ding hi
Note pai un la, na muhna peuhpeuh uhah na buhtu ding uh va zong tawm un. Ahih hangin na nasep ngeizah uh themkhat zong hong kikhiamlo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin a buhtu dingun buhkung a kaikhawm dingin Egypt gam khempeuhah mite kikhenthang uh hi
Nasem ukte in kin ngaihsut uh a, “Buhtu hong kipiak hun mah bangin na nisim nasep zah uh zo un,” ci uh hi
Israel mi nasem mapi, Faro' nasem ukte in amaute a uk dingin a koih sawn mite kisatin, “Bang hangin tu ciangdong, leiseek bawl ding na nasep khempeuh uh hih khin nailo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in kidong hi
Tua ciangin Israel mi nasem mapite hong pai-in Faro' kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasemte hih bangin hong bawl na hi hiam
Na nasemte tungah buhtu hong kipialo hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ko tungah, ‘Leiseek bawl un!’ hong ci hi. En in, na nasem kote hong kisat hi. Hih thu-ah nangma mite khialzaw hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “Note na thadah uh hi, note na thadah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in, ‘Hong paisak un la, Topa' tungah biakna hong piasak un,’ na ci uh hi
Tu-in pai un la na sem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note buhtu hong kipialo ding a, ahi zongin leiseek a mal ngeina zah mah na piakhia ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Amaute in, “Bangbang hita leh nisimin leiseek na seek zah uh khiamlo ding,” a cih ciangin, amaute thu haksapi sungah om ahihlam uh Israel mi nasem mapite in mu uh hi
Amaute Faro kiang panin a paikhiat ciangun, amaute a na ngak Moses leh Aaron tawh kituak uh hi

Amaute in, “ Topa in note hong enin thu hong khen hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro leh a nasemte' muhna-ah kote a khial nong suaksak uh a, kote hong kithah theihna dingin thu a zong na hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
Tua ciangin Topa' lamah Moses kihei kikin, “ Topa aw, bang hangin nangmah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei hong sawl peuhmah na hi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma min suangin Faro' kiangah thugen dingin ka pai khita kipan, amah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl napi-in nangmah in na mite na honkhia het kei hi,” a ci hi.
